prompt: Portrait orientation, taller than wide, 3:4. A recessive backdrop meant as quiet accompaniment to story text — understated, never drawing the eye to a single harsh focal point. No people, no text, no lettering, no UI overlays. Exits, doorways, openings, passages and stairwells are mere THRESHOLDS — render each only as a plain opening, dark doorway or dim stairwell set in a wall, and NEVER depict the interior of whatever room lies beyond it; default any view through an exit to darkness or dim, indistinct light. Exits must never dominate or drive the composition. The room's own permanent contents are always the subject.
